genre_refs: WPA / mid-century industrial poster art; socialist-realist heroic-worker iconography
description: AI-generated illustrated poster in a mid-20th-century industrial style. It depicts a square-jawed young white male worker with neatly combed reddish-blond hair and blue eyes, wearing an open-collared blue chambray work shirt with the sleeves rolled up and a leather belt, looking into the distance. Behind him is an illustrated construction scene with red tower cranes, a smokestack, clouds and a blue sky rendered in flat, painterly colors. Large bold white sans-serif caps text across the lower portion reads 'BUILD AMERICA'S FUTURE!' A small Department of Labor eagle-style emblem appears in the bottom-right corner. The skin is slightly waxy and the features are symmetrical.
